title: AST Death Investigation: Homer [AK25123766]
summary: On 12/13/2025, Alaska State Troopers in Anchor Point received a report of a deceased person in Homer. Subsequent investigation determined 65-year-old (Jon) Marlon Prazen had passed away in his home. No foul play is suspected. Next-of-kin have been notified
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: Prazen had passed away in his home

title: Equinox sells Brazilian operations to CMOC for over $1B
summary: Equinox Gold (TSX, NYSE-A: EQX) has sold its Brazilian operations to China’s CMOC Group in a deal worth over $1 billion, the Canadian gold miner announced in a press release on Sunday. The assets included in the sale are Equinox’s 100% interest in the Aurizona mine in Maranhão, the RDM mine in Minas...

title: Massive critical minerals deposit found in Utah
summary: A Utah-based mining company says it has discovered a massive deposit of rare earths and other critical minerals, calling it potentially “one of North America’s most significant” finds to date. title: 2nd round of high winds blows Colony Christmas parade into next week
summary: Due to another round of high winds, the annual Colony Christmas parade and fireworks show in downtown Palmer has been postponed until Dec. 19.
